narrative:
Brookfield Twp Only township has 5,592 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.6%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.8 percentage points.
